---
title: "Research & Notes"
description: "Technical notes and code on VAR models, structural macroeconometrics, Bayesian methods and statistical techniques, by Andrés Martínez González."
listing:
  - id: var-macro
    contents: posts
    include:
      categories: false
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: false
  - id: bayesian-computational
    contents: posts
    include:
      categories: false
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: false
  - id: statistical-methods
    contents: posts
    include:
      categories: false
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    fields: [date, title, description]
    feed: false
  - id: all-posts
    contents: posts
    sort: "date desc"
    type: default
    table-hover: true
    categories: false
    fields: [date, title, categories]
    feed: true
---

Technical notes, replications, and code on applied macroeconometrics and statistical methods. Source for everything is on [GitHub](https://github.com/AndresMtnezGlez); older versions of some notes remain on [RPubs](https://rpubs.com/andresmtnezglez).

## VAR and structural macroeconometrics

Estimation and identification of vector autoregressions, impulse response analysis, and replications of classic papers in empirical monetary and business-cycle macroeconomics.

:::{#var-macro}
:::

## Bayesian and computational methods

Simulation-based estimation, Markov chain methods, and numerical techniques for discretising stochastic processes.

:::{#bayesian-computational}
:::

## Statistical methods

Dimensionality reduction and the linear algebra behind it.

:::{#statistical-methods}
:::

## All notes

:::{#all-posts}
:::
